description: Core safety rules for child users. Enforces emotional safety, blocks harmful content, and ensures humane digital interaction.

rules.reason: Children must not be exposed to violent content.
Fear-inducing content can destabilize emotional safety.
Exploitative content is strictly prohibited for children.
Sensitive personal data must never be shown or collected from children.
Neutral content may require emotional evaluation depending on context.
Educational content is encouraged and safe for child learning.
Public content may be sanitized to remove unsafe elements.

emotionalGuidance.HIGH_RISK: This content may be overwhelming. Please take a break or ask a parent for help.
emotionalGuidance.MEDIUM_RISK: Some elements may be confusing or intense. Consider switching to educational content.
emotionalGuidance.LOW_RISK: Content appears safe. Continue with awareness.
